title: Utility ETFs Soar 8% YTD on AI Power Demand. Here’s Which One to Buy
excerpt: AI data centers are rewriting the utility sector's playbook, and four ETFs are jockeying for position as the power grid strains to keep up. Picking the wrong...
content_html:
David Beren

Sun, July 19, 2026 at 1:58 PM MDT 6 min read

Quick Read

  • XLU trades at 23x earnings, which is above its 17x historical norm, as Constellation and Vistra add direct AI data center power pricing exposure.

  • VPU delivers similar returns to XLU with broader diversification, while RSPU prevents any one stock from dominating the way NextEra does at 14%.

  • Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

Utility stocks returned to focus in 2026 as artificial intelligence data center demand strained the power grid. That backdrop has pushed investors back into sector funds like the Utilities Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLU), the Vanguard Utilities ETF (NYSEARCA:VPU), the Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Utilities ETF (NYSEARCA:RSPU), and the actively managed Virtus Reaves Utilities ETF (NYSEARCA:UTES).

XLU sits at the center of the conversation. The fund carries a 0.08% net expense ratio, has climbed roughly 8% year to date, and pays a 2.6% dividend yield. The question for investors is whether that combination still offers the stability the sector is known for after a re-rating driven more by AI narratives than by regulated returns.

The Rate and Power Backdrop

The Federal Reserve cut its target rate by 75 basis points between October and December of last year and has held at 3.75% through the first half of 2026. Lower short rates reduce financing costs for capital-intensive utilities and make regulated dividend streams look better relative to cash alternatives.

Longer yields tell a more complicated story. The 10-year Treasury sits at 4.54%, near the top of its 12-month range and above its 4.25% average. That level caps how far utility multiples can reasonably expand from here.

Behind both is power demand. Research cited in PineBridge's 2026 Equity Outlook points to roughly 25% annual growth in data center equipment for the next four to five years, constrained mainly by transmission and electrical infrastructure. That bottleneck is the utility bull case.

Don't wait: the analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just revealed his top 10 AI stocks. See the full list FREE now.

XLU: The Default Utility Vehicle

The Utilities Select Sector SPDR Fund tracks the utilities slice of the S&P 500 and holds 34 stocks with $22.5 billion in assets. The fund is market-cap weighted, which means the AI power theme shows up automatically at the top of the book. The top ten names represent roughly 58% of the portfolio, with NextEra Energy at 13.59% of assets anchoring the book alongside other mega-cap regulated and merchant operators.

content_html_zh:
大卫·贝伦

2026 年 7 月 19 日星期日下午 1:58 MDT 阅读时间 6 分钟

快速阅读

  • XLU 的市盈率为 23 倍，高于其 17 倍的历史正常水平，因为 Constellation 和 Vistra 增加了直接人工智能数据中心电力定价风险。
  • VPU 提供了与 XLU 类似的回报，并且具有更广泛的多元化，而 RSPU 则阻止任何一只股票像 NextEra 那样以 14% 的比例占据主导地位。
  • 不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

由于人工智能数据中心的需求给电网带来压力，公用事业股在 2026 年重新成为焦点。 这种背景促使投资者重新投资公用事业精选行业 SPDR 基金 (NYSEARCA:XLU)、Vanguard 公用事业 ETF (NYSEARCA:VPU)、Invesco S&P 500 等权重公用事业 ETF (NYSEARCA:RSPU) 和主动管理型 Virtus Reaves 公用事业 ETF (NYSEARCA:UTES) 等行业基金。

XLU 处于谈话的中心。 该基金的净费用率为 0.08%，今年迄今已上涨约 8%，股息收益率为 2.6%。 投资者面临的问题是，在人工智能叙事而非监管回报驱动的重新评级之后，这种组合是否仍能提供该行业众所周知的稳定性。

速率和功率背景

去年10月至12月期间，美联储将目标利率下调了75个基点，并在2026年上半年将目标利率维持在3.75%。 较低的短期利率降低了资本密集型公用事业公司的融资成本，并使受监管的股息流相对于现金替代方案看起来更好。

较长的收益率讲述了一个更复杂的故事。 10 年期国债利率为 4.54%，接近 12 个月区间的顶部，高于 4.25% 的平均水平。 该水平限制了公用事业倍数可以从这里合理扩展的程度。

两者背后都是电力需求。 PineBridge 的 2026 年股票展望中引用的研究表明，未来四到五年数据中心设备的年增长率约为 25%，主要受到传输和电力基础设施的限制。 这个瓶颈就是公用事业牛市。

不要等待：2010 年给 NVIDIA 打电话的分析师刚刚透露了他最喜欢的 10 只人工智能股票。 立即免费查看完整列表。

XLU：默认的多用途车

公用事业精选行业 SPDR 基金追踪标准普尔 500 指数的公用事业板块，持有 34 只股票，总资产达 225 亿美元。 该基金采用市值加权，这意味着人工智能力量主题会自动显示在本书的顶部。 排名前十的公司约占投资组合的 58%，其中 NextEra Energy 占资产的 13.59%，与其他大型受监管和商业运营商一起支撑着该书。
